nasb.text: that they may offer acceptable sacrifices to the God of heaven and pray for the life of the king and his sons.

esv.text: that they may offer pleasing sacrifices to the God of heaven and pray for the life of the king and his sons.

cnv.text: 好讓他們可以獻馨香的祭給天上的　神，為王和王的子孫祈求長壽。

ccb.text: 好让他们向天上的上帝献上蒙悦纳的祭物，并为王和众王子求寿。
